title: juncus subcaudatus
intro: Juncus subcaudatus, also known as needle rush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the Juncaceae family, characterized by its slender stems and needle-like leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Juncus subcaudatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Juncus subcaudatus include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water to extract its medicinal properties.
